CustomField.description: Reference field for issue #125's Apex-trigger bridge alternative (see CaseApprovalBridgeTrigger.trigger / NativeApprovalTriggerBridgeExample.cls). Set to Pending on submission; flipped to Approved or Rejected only by the native Approval Process's final field-update actions (Set_Status_Approved / Set_Status_Rejected). CaseApprovalBridgeTrigger fires when this changes away from Pending and signals the corresponding decision directly in Apex.
CustomField.label: Approval Status
